title: heliophila scandens
intro: Heliophila scandens, also known as the Climbing Heliotrope or Creeping Heliotrope, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Heliophila scandens include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
